TWOTV: The Whispers of the Void is a world where the Hackers have won and rule over Robloxia, obliging all robloxians alive to hide under shelter of underground bases.

Ths bot is based on that Roblox universe that I have! Um, yeah.

Hey guys!

Sorry for leaving you all without the Clockwork bot! Umm, this bot will um be for Christmas!

I am gonna be honest with all of you.

I think I may.. perhaps... be loosing interest into making bots...

That doesn't mean I'll stop making them, just that I just prefer focusing on... well, my life or my characters...
